set(WO_TEST_SHLIBEXT "${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX}")
set(WO_TEST_SITE_CFG_INPUT "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/lit.site.cfg.py.in")
set(WO_TEST_SRC_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}")

set(LIT_SITE_CFG_IN_HEADER
  "## Autogenerated from ${WO_TEST_SITE_CFG_INPUT}\n## Do not edit!")

configure_file("${WO_TEST_SITE_CFG_INPUT}"
  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/lit.site.cfg.py" @ONLY)
